description_long: This is a compact, military-style scooter equipped with heavy weaponry, including a large forward-facing cannon mounted above the front wheel and multiple cylindrical rocket launchers attached to both sides of the vehicle. The body is primarily olive drab with a utilitarian, rugged design, and features a single brown seat for the operator. The frame is reinforced, with visible metal supports and brackets securing the weapon mounts. The vehicle has two wheels, with the rear wheel partially obscured by the side-mounted launchers, and a small headlight at the front. The overall appearance is that of a lightweight, mobile anti-armor or anti-fortification platform designed for rapid deployment in urban environments.
description: A compact olive drab military scooter with a large front cannon and multiple side-mounted rocket launchers, featuring a single brown seat and reinforced metal frame.
description_view_0: Front view showing the large cannon above the front wheel, flanked by cylindrical rocket launchers on both sides.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the length of the cannon, the brown seat, and the arrangement of three rocket launchers on the left side.
description_view_2: Top-down view displaying the symmetrical placement of rocket launchers and the central seat, with the cannon extending forward.
description_view_3: Right side view showing the right-side rocket launchers, the cannon, and the vehicle's structural frame.
attribute_weapon_mounts: One large cannon mounted above the front wheel, three cylindrical rocket launchers on each side of the rear body for a total of six side-mounted launchers.
attribute_armor_plating: No visible heavy armor plating; the body appears to be standard metal with some reinforcement around the weapon mounts.
attribute_camouflage_pattern: Solid olive drab paint with no visible camouflage pattern.
attribute_tire_type: Two standard rubber tires with minimal visible tread, not specialized for off-road use.
